issues: FACTUAL ERROR: Article states 'basiert auf Ontoserver, einem FHIR-konformen Terminologieserver des australischen CSIRO'. This is wrong. BfArM's central terminology server is based on TerminoloGIT, an open-source solution developed by Austrian ELGA. CSIRO Ontoserver is a separate product used by NHS UK and others. Confirmed by BfArM official website (bfarm.de) and BfArM press release 2024.

FACTUAL ERROR: Article states the API base URL is 'https://ontoserver.bfarm.de/fhir'. The actual URL is 'https://terminologien.bfarm.de'. The domain 'ontoserver.bfarm.de' does not appear to exist as the official endpoint.
The technik callout references 'r4.ontoserver.csiro.au/fhir' as a test alternative — this CSIRO public instance is real, but framing it alongside a wrong BfArM URL compounds the confusion.
Section 'Ontoserver-Technologie' describes CSIRO-specific features (ECL, Syndication-API) as features of the BfArM server — these are specific to Ontoserver and may not apply to TerminoloGIT.
gematik INA Positionspapier source URL (ina.gematik.de/fileadmin/Dokumente/Positionspapier_Terminologieservices.pdf): unverified via browser — plausible path.
All frontmatter fields present. 13 wiki-links, all relevant. Required sections present. 4 sources, 2 official (BfArM, CSIRO).
Claim '350.000 SNOMED-CT Konzepte': unverifiable from quick search; SNOMED CT International has over 350,000 concepts — plausible.
BfArM URL source confirmed live via Playwright.
articles.fixInstructions: 1. In Überblick, replace 'Er basiert auf Ontoserver, einem FHIR-konformen Terminologieserver des australischen CSIRO (Commonwealth Scientific and Industrial Research Organisation).' with 'Er basiert auf TerminoloGIT, einem Open-Source-Terminologiedienst des österreichischen ELGA-Systems, der gemeinsam von gematik, BfArM, ELGA GmbH und eHealth Suisse weiterentwickelt wird.' 2. In the interesse-technik callout, replace 'https://ontoserver.bfarm.de/fhir' with 'https://terminologien.bfarm.de'. 3. Remove or reframe the 'Ontoserver-Technologie' section: replace 'Ontoserver ist ein kommerzieller FHIR-Terminologieserver von CSIRO' with an accurate description of TerminoloGIT and its collaborative development. Remove the CSIRO source in Quellen and replace with the TerminoloGIT/BfArM press release (https://www.bfarm.de/SharedDocs/Pressemitteilungen/DE/2024/pm07-2024.html). 4. Replace the CSIRO Ontoserver source URL with: [BfArM: Pressemitteilung Zentraler Terminologieserver (2024)](https://www.bfarm.de/SharedDocs/Pressemitteilungen/DE/2024/pm07-2024.html).

issues: BMBF fördert MII seit 2016: confirmed. BMBF Bekanntmachung 2015 initiated it; four consortia started in 2018. Article says 'seit 2016' — the first formal funding round started in 2016/2017 (Konzeptphase), so 2016 as start date is defensible.

MII Budget 'mehrere hundert Millionen Euro': confirmed by medizininformatik-initiative.de ('mehr als 480 Millionen Euro'). The article's phrasing 'mehrere hundert Millionen Euro' is accurate though understated.
Claim BMBF co-funds RKI with BMG: confirmed. RKI is in the Geschäftsbereich of BMG; BMBF co-funds specific research at RKI. Minor imprecision in institutional description.
BMBF website source URL confirmed valid (bmbf.de).

Claim about Innovationsfonds: 'Gemeinsam mit dem G-BA fördert das BMBF neue Versorgungsformen' — technically inaccurate: Innovationsfonds is funded by GKV-Kassen (§ 92a SGB V), not by BMBF. BMBF may co-fund adjacent programs but the Innovationsfonds is a G-BA/GKV instrument. Minor factual imprecision.
Only 3 sources — meets minimum.
All frontmatter fields present. 6 wiki-links. This is a stub article; limited depth is acceptable.

issues: STIKO gegründet 1972: confirmed. However, it was founded at the Bundesgesundheitsamt (BGA), not the RKI. The article says 'Die STIKO wurde 1972 gegründet und ist beim RKI angesiedelt.' — the founding location (BGA) is omitted. Not a factual error (current location is RKI), but historically imprecise.
STIKO 'bis zu 18 ehrenamtlich tätigen Sachverständigen': RKI FAQ confirms '12 bis 18 ehrenamtliche Mitglieder'. The article's 'bis zu 18' is accurate.

FACTUAL ERROR (wiki-link target): In Technische Details, the article writes '[[BfArM|Paul-Ehrlich-Institut (PEI)]]' — this renders as 'Paul-Ehrlich-Institut (PEI)' but links to the BfArM article. BfArM and PEI are different institutions: PEI (Paul-Ehrlich-Institut) licenses vaccines and biologics; BfArM licenses chemical drugs. Using [[BfArM]] as the link target for PEI is incorrect and misleading. No PEI article exists yet.
§ 20 IfSG as legal basis for STIKO: confirmed. § 20 Abs. 2 IfSG governs STIKO membership and recommendations.
RKI source URLs (rki.de/stiko_node and rki.de/impfempfehlungen_node): plausible; not verified via browser but standard RKI URL patterns.
Only 3 sources — meets minimum.
